item.title: Tomorrow night, @shabakahutchings headlines the Main Hall. A leading light in mo...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@shabakahutchings

Tomorrow night, @shabakahutchings headlines the Main Hall. A leading light in modern Jazz, he is joined by @irreversibleentanglements and @tomskinnermusic for this special night recommended by @newyorkermag.

Last tickets on DICE

Se slideshow på Instagram

item.title: Snippet of John Coltrane’s song ‘Naima’ from rehearsal with Joe Lovano, Joey Bar...
item.description:
🎬 Video

@shabakahutchings

Snippet of John Coltrane’s song ‘Naima’ from rehearsal with Joe Lovano, Joey Baron, Drew Gress, Leo Genovese, Jakob Bro, Avishai cohen celebrating the music of Miles Davis and John Coltrane
@bergamojazz_festival

▶️ Åbn video direkte · se på Instagram
item.content:encoded:

@bergamojazz_festival

item.author: shabakahutchings

item.title: My new album ‘Of The Earth’ is released today on Shabaka Records. This music is ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (11 medier)

@shabakahutchings

My new album ‘Of The Earth’ is released today on Shabaka Records. This music is personal and has lived in my headphones for so long it’s great to see it out in the world. It’s been this whole process of learning, experimenting, questioning, reconciling opposing answers and listening for the internal voices that speak when no one else is around. And in the end I’m left knowing no certainties about who I am and what the future holds. All I can vouch for is the fact that potential is limitless in the face of willpower and we are much more than the labels we attach to ourselves.

Link in bio to listen now. 🌎

Slide 1 and 12 by #marwabelghazi
Slide 2: @josephouechen

Creative Mastering by: @_ja__min
Album cover photo by @atibaphoto

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (11 medier)

@shabakahutchings

My new album ‘Of The Earth’ is released today on Shabaka Records. This music is personal and has lived in my headphones for so long it’s great to see it out in the world. It’s been this whole process of learning, experimenting, questioning, reconciling opposing answers and listening for the internal voices that speak when no one else is around. And in the end I’m left knowing no certainties about who I am and what the future holds. All I can vouch for is the fact that potential is limitless in the face of willpower and we are much more than the labels we attach to ourselves.

Link in bio to listen now. 🌎

Slide 1 and 12 by #marwabelghazi
Slide 2: @josephouechen

Creative Mastering by: @_ja__min
Album cover photo by @atibaphoto

Se slideshow på Instagram

@shabakahutchings

I’m heading to the US this spring. New show just announced in Chicago @constellationchicago
Come.
Link in bio for info & tickets.

item.author: shabakahutchings

item.title: I’m so happy to announce my next album ‘Of The Earth’ will be released on March ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (7 medier)

@shabakahutchings

I’m so happy to announce my next album ‘Of The Earth’ will be released on March 6th.

Produced, performed and mixed by myself, ‘creative mastering’ by @_ja__min

None of the music was started with the intention of being part of an album. It’s been this freewheeling process of researching equipment and seeing what music is suggested to me once manuals have been read and YouTube tutorial videos have been watched multiple times. It’s been about trusting my ears, being ok with not ‘knowing’ what I’m doing, knowing what I like, trusting my taste, not allowing the impulse to self deprecate stop me from keeping on playfully experimenting, and being open to hearing when something of worth comes up.

The record comes out on my newly formed imprint Shabaka Records. In today’s climate, independence is power.

The first two singles ‘A Future Untold’ and ‘Marwa The Mountain’ are out today.

Each song on the album is represented by an artwork that I’ve worked on alongside the music, and which I see as visual representations of the sound.

Link in bio to listen and Pre-Order.

Slide 1: @atibaphoto
Slide 2 & 3: @josephouechen
Slide 5 & 6: #marwabelghazi
Slide 4 & 7: Original artwork by me

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (7 medier)

@shabakahutchings

I’m so happy to announce my next album ‘Of The Earth’ will be released on March 6th.

Produced, performed and mixed by myself, ‘creative mastering’ by @_ja__min

None of the music was started with the intention of being part of an album. It’s been this freewheeling process of researching equipment and seeing what music is suggested to me once manuals have been read and YouTube tutorial videos have been watched multiple times. It’s been about trusting my ears, being ok with not ‘knowing’ what I’m doing, knowing what I like, trusting my taste, not allowing the impulse to self deprecate stop me from keeping on playfully experimenting, and being open to hearing when something of worth comes up.

The record comes out on my newly formed imprint Shabaka Records. In today’s climate, independence is power.

The first two singles ‘A Future Untold’ and ‘Marwa The Mountain’ are out today.

Each song on the album is represented by an artwork that I’ve worked on alongside the music, and which I see as visual representations of the sound.

Link in bio to listen and Pre-Order.

Slide 1: @atibaphoto
Slide 2 & 3: @josephouechen
Slide 5 & 6: #marwabelghazi
Slide 4 & 7: Original artwork by me

Se slideshow på Instagram
